stock_market.summary: Q2 markets open with a focus on productivity (AI/Infra) and defensive sectors. Tactical rebound remains a theme, with investors balancing geopolitical stability with growth potential.

art_market.summary: April activity is ramping up with ART OnO in Seoul (April 3-5). High-value provenanced works remain the focus for collectors in Q2.

key_metrics.major_events: ART OnO Seoul, Christie's Asia 40th anniversary
